programme.desc: James Bond (Roger Moore) may have met his match in Octopussy (Maud Adams), an entrancing beauty involved in a devastating military plot to destroy détente. From the palaces of India to a speeding circus train in Germany and a midair battle on the wing of a high-flying jet, only Agent 007 can stop the nightmarish scheme!

programme.title: Nelly Knows Mysteries: A Fatal Engagement
programme.desc: When Dahlia's boyfriend is found dead, advice columnist Nelly joins Detective Hogan to help find the killer. However, as suspicions creep in, Dahlia becomes the prime suspect.

programme.title: Devotion
programme.desc: The inspirational true story of Jesse Brown, the first Black aviator in U.S. Navy history, and his enduring friendship with fellow fighter pilot Tom Hudner. Helping to turn the tide in the most brutal battle in the Korean War, their heroic sacrifices ultimately make them the Navy's most celebrated wingmen.

programme.title: Secret Headquarters
programme.desc: Friendship and courage take center stage when Charlie and his friends stumble upon the headquarters of the Guard and realize the world's most powerful superhero is Charlie's dad. When an evil businessman sends in a team to infiltrate the lair and retrieve the Guard's energy source, the youngsters spring into action and turn the tables on the intruders.

programme.title: All Light, Everywhere
programme.desc: Filmmaker Theo Anthony offers a far-ranging look at the biases in how people see things, focusing on the recorded image.

programme.title: Hacks
programme.desc: A dark mentorship forms between Deborah Vance, a legendary Las Vegas comic, and an entitled, outcast 25-year-old comedy writer.

programme.title: On the Roam
programme.desc: A deep dive into the world of music as Jason visits the Gibson garage to rebuild instruments and explores the craftsmanship behind their sound.

programme.title: "Wuthering Heights"
programme.desc: Tragedy strikes when Heathcliff falls in love with Catherine Earnshaw, a woman from a wealthy family in 18th-century England.

programme.title: Hey, Viktor!
programme.desc: Twenty-five long years after his time in the limelight, former child actor Cody Lightning tries to revive his fame with a self-produced sequel to "Smoke Signals.".

programme.title: Y2K
programme.desc: On the last night of 1999, two high school juniors crash a New Year's Eve party, only to find themselves fighting for their lives when the terror of Y2K becomes a reality and all machines rise up against humanity.

programme.title: The Curse of the Necklace
programme.desc: When Laura Davis is gifted an antique necklace, her daughters uncover a sinister force hidden within that threatens to destroy everything they love.

programme.title: Emma Fielding Mysteries
programme.desc: Emma is hired to consult on the acquisition of a castle-like estate that local legends claim carries a curse.

programme.title: Garage Sale Mystery: The Wedding Dress
programme.desc: Sleuth Jennifer Shannon (Lori Loughlin) and Detective Lynwood (Barclay Hope) investigate a decades-old case involving the disappearance of a groom.

programme.title: Meet the Killer Parents
programme.desc: A young woman fights to escape her boyfriend's family after learning they're planning to groom her to replace their long-dead daughter.

programme.title: We Three Kings
programme.desc: A retired musician hatches a plan to bring his three daughters home for Christmas for the first time since their mother's death. Holiday songs and old memories soon make the estranged siblings realize that life is better when they're all together.

programme.title: Selena + Chef
programme.desc: Pastry chef and activist Paola Velez comes ready with a sweet treat for Selena, helping her create a chocolate cookie icebox cake; also on the menu are beef empanadas.

programme.title: Selena + Chef
programme.desc: Selena is joined in person for a special, fast-paced lesson with culinary icon Gordon Ramsay; the two prepare a luxurious feast with butter-basted steak, pan-seared scallops, smashed potatoes and chimichurri.

programme.title: The World Is Not Enough
programme.desc: Bond (Pierce Brosnan) must race to defuse an international power struggle with the world's oil supply hanging in the balance. Elektra King (Sophie Marceau), is the daughter of a murdered oil tycoon whom Bond is assigned to protect. The villain is Renard (Robert Carlyle), who has a bullet lodged in his brain rendering him unable to feel pain. Also featuring nuclear weapons expert Dr. Christmas Jone

programme.title: Transformers: Rise of the Beasts
programme.desc: Optimus Prime and the Autobots take on their biggest challenge yet. When a new threat capable of destroying the entire planet emerges, they must team up with a powerful faction of Transformers known as the Maximals to save Earth.

programme.title: My Penguin Friend
programme.desc: A heartbroken fisherman finds a penguin drifting alone in the ocean, drenched in oil from a spill. He not only rescues the sea creature, but takes it under his wing, finding a sense of joy for the first time in years.

programme.title: Fear Thy Neighbor
programme.desc: When a large and boisterous family moves to a quiet street, the neighbors directly across from them get into immediate conflict over all the noise; soon the dispute consumes everyone and is only settled with the deadly crack of a baseball bat.

programme.title: Flashpoint
programme.desc: The SRU team is called in when a woman takes hostages at a gas station.

programme.title: Forensic Factor
programme.desc: A phantom white supremacist sect takes credits for bombings and bank robberies in Spokane, Wash., but FBI forensic photo analysts clears the picture.

programme.title: Chicago Med
programme.desc: Marcel adjusts to his newfound fame when he helps Halstead treat a local restaurant owner; Choi, Charles and Goodwin aid a new mother who is worried about hurting her baby; Maggie and Taylor clash with a patient who is eager to get back to work.

programme.title: Chicago Med
programme.desc: Med runs out of scrubs, forcing the staff to improvise; the life of Archer's son is in danger; Marcel and Charles help a kidney transplant patient experiencing psychosis; Asher and Halstead grow closer.

programme.title: Chicago Med

programme.title: Chicago Med
programme.desc: Halstead relies on Marcel and Med's newly donated OR 2.0 to save his patient; Charles helps an elderly, confused patient who's mourning the loss of his high school sweetheart; as their wedding day approaches, Choi and April run into some roadblocks.
